---
title: "PEPP2 - results"
author: "Olivier Percie du Sert"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE, echo=FALSE)
```

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(magrittr)
```

```{r working session, include=FALSE}
ws <- c("SOFAS", "SAPS", "SANS") %>% 
  map_chr(\(x)
          str_c(getwd(), x, sep = "/") %>%
            list.files(full.names = T) %>% 
            file.info() %>%
            filter(isdir==FALSE) %>% 
            slice_max(mtime) %>% # get the most updated workspace
            rownames())

env <- map(1:3, new.env) %>% 
  set_names(c('SOFAS.env', 'SAPS.env', 'SANS.env'))
  map2(ws, env, \(x, y) load(x, envir = y))
  list2env(env, globalenv())
```

<!-- To add: R3STEP, Missing data, Assumptions -->

# Analyses
## Sample
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/Sample.png)

## Trajectory analyses
Primary outcomes:\
- SOFAS | 0, 12, 24 months\
- SAPS | 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24-month\
- SANS | 0, 1, 2, 3, 6, 9, 12, 18, 24-month\

### Models
#### GCM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GCM.png)

$$Y_{it} = \pi_{0i} + \pi_{1i}t + \varepsilon_{it} $$\
$\pi_{0i} = \mu_{00} + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i} = \mu_{10} + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\

**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=1}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= freely estimated</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{it} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_t^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = freely estimated across $t$</span>\
\
\

#### GBTM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GBTM.png)

$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\

**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=1:6}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= 0</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma^2)$ <span style="color:red">= fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=1:k}$</span>\
\
\

#### LCGA
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/LCGA.png)

$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji}\text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red">= 0</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{(k)(t)}^2)$ <span style="color:red">= relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$,  across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\
\
\

#### GMM
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/GMM.png)

##### GMMi (class-invariant)
$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i} = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji} \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red"> = relaxed stepwise</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{((k)(t))}^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$, relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$, across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\
\
\

##### GMMv (class-variant)\
$$Y_{it}^k = \pi_{0i}^k + \pi_{1i}^kt + \varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)}$$\
$\pi_{0i}^k = \mu_{00}^k + \zeta_{0i}^k$ (intercept)\
$\pi_{1i}^k = \mu_{10}^k + \zeta_{1i}^k$ (slope)\
\
**Assumptions:**\
- class = $C_{i=k}$\
- growth factors variance $\zeta_{ji}^k \text{ ~ } N(0, \Psi_{jj}^k) \text{, } j = 0, 1$ <span style="color:red"> = relaxed stepwise across $C_{i=k}$</span>\
- residual variance $\varepsilon_{i(t)}^{(k)} \text{ ~ } N(0, \sigma_{((k)(t))}^2)$ <span style="color:red"> = fixed across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$, relaxed across $C_{i=k}$, across $t$, across $t$ & $C_{i=k}$</span>\

### Model selection strategy
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/LGMMs.png)

Missing data: FIML

## Regression analyses
**Manual 3-step approach:**\
- Estimate the unconditional (covariates excluded) LGM model (class enumeration, optimal model selection)\
- Extract misclassification error rates (logit)\
- Estimate the conditional (covariates included) LGM model using class variables and logits\

The three-step approach preserves the class classification from the unconditional LGM and allows for the estimation of the effects of covariates after taking into account class uncertainty rates.\

![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/Regression models.png)
![](/Users/olivierpercie/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-McGillUniversity/CRISP/PhD/1. PEPP2/Statistics/TVCreg.png)

Missing data: FIML\
$\alpha$: Bonferroni correction\

### Multinomial logistic regressions: 
$$P(C_i = k |X_i) = \frac{e^{(b_{k0} +b_{k1}X_i)}}{\sum_{s=1}^K e^{(b_{s0} +b_{s1}X_i)}}$$

   |
---|-------------------------------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Class membership:** $C_{i=k}$
$X$| **Sociodemographics:** age, education, FIQ, SES, onset, DUP, PAS\
     **Baseline predictors:** `r paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'SOFAS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'YMRS'), '0', sep = '_')`

### Mixture regressions:
$$\pi_{0i}^{(k)} = \mu_{00}^{(k)} + \gamma_{01}^{(k)}X_i + \zeta_{_{0i}}^{(k)}$$
$$\pi_{1i}^{(k)} = \mu_{10}^{(k)} + \gamma_{11}^{(k)}X_i + \zeta_{_{1i}}^{(k)}$$
   
   | 
---|-----------------------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Growth factors** $\pi_{0i}^{(k)}$ (intercept), $\pi_{1i}^{(k)}(slope)$\
**Primary outcome:** SOFAS, SAPS, SANS
$X$| **Time-varying covariates:** SOFAS, SAPS, SANS, CDA, HAS, YMRS

<!-- ### Multiple linear regressions -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- Y_i=(b_0 + b_1X_1 + b_2X_2 + ... + b_nX_{ni}) + \varepsilon_i -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- $Y$: **Primary outcome** (SOFAS, SAPS, SANS)\ -->
<!-- $X$: **Time-varying covariates** (SOFAS, SAPS, SANS, CDA, HAS, YMRS)\ -->

### Linear regressions:
$$
Y_i=(b_0 + b_1C_{i=k}) + \varepsilon_i
$$
   
   
   | 
---|-----------------------------------------------
$Y$| **Distal outcomes:** `r paste(c('SAPS', 'SANS', 'SOFAS', 'HAS', 'CDS', 'YMRS'), '24', sep = '_')`, remission ( -early, -endpoint, -cumulative)\
**variable to add/consider:** clozapine-use, recovery, mortality, suicide, self-harm
$X$| **Class membership:** $C_{i=k}$

## Sensitivity analyses
- individually varying timescores\
- intent-to-treat analysis\

# Results
## SOFAS
```{r}
pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "plot")
```

Quadratic GBTM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>% 
select(n, starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>% 
knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "R3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON")) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / nrow(.))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of primary outome
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "TVCreg_stdyx") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^PSR", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SOFAS.env$TVCreg_models))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SOFAS.env", "D3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^CDS", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  mutate(LatentClass = ifelse(LatentClass == "Categorical.Latent.Variables", "C", LatentClass)) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = ifelse(paramHeader == "New.Additional.Parameters", "Pairwise", paramHeader)) %>% 
  filter(WaldChiSq_PValue < (0.05 / sum(.$paramHeader == "Pairwise"))) %>% 
  filter(pval < 0.05) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```


## SAPS
```{r}
pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "plot")
```


Cubic class-variant GMM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>% 
select(n, starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>% 
knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "R3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON")) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / nrow(.))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of primary outome
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "TVCreg_stdyx") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^(NSR|CDS)", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SAPS.env$TVCreg_models))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of growth factors wihtin latent classes
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "MixREG_stdyx") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^(PSR|YMRS)", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05/length(env$SAPS.env$MixREG_models))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SAPS.env", "D3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  mutate(LatentClass = ifelse(LatentClass == "Categorical.Latent.Variables", "C", LatentClass)) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = ifelse(paramHeader == "New.Additional.Parameters", "Pairwise", paramHeader)) %>% 
  filter(WaldChiSq_PValue < (0.05 / sum(.$paramHeader == "Pairwise"))) %>% 
  filter(pval<0.05) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()

```

## SANS
```{r}
pluck(env, "SANS.env", "plot")
```

Cubic ($C_1$) / linear($C_2$, $C_3$) class-variant GMM\
```{r}
pluck(env, "SANS.env", "FINAL_fit") %>% 
select(n, starts_with(c("count", "proportion"))) %>% 
knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Predictors of class membership
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SANS.env", "R3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(paramHeader, "C#\\d.ON")) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / (nrow(.) / 2))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of primary outome
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SANS.env", "TVCreg_stdyx") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^(PSR|NSR|CDS|YMRS)", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SANS.env$TVCreg_models))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Time-varying predictors of growth factors wihtin latent classes
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SANS.env", "MixREG_stdyx") %>%  
  filter(str_detect(param, "^(YMRS|PSR|NSR)", negate = TRUE)) %>%
  filter(pval < (0.05 / length(env$SANS.env$MixREG_models))) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors, -sig) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```

### Distal outcomes of latent classes
```{r}
  pluck(env, "SANS.env", "D3STEP_unstd") %>%  
  mutate(LatentClass = ifelse(LatentClass == "Categorical.Latent.Variables", "C", LatentClass)) %>% 
  mutate(paramHeader = ifelse(paramHeader == "New.Additional.Parameters", "Pairwise", paramHeader)) %>% 
  filter(WaldChiSq_PValue < (0.05 / (sum(.$paramHeader == "Pairwise")/2))) %>% 
  filter(pval < 0.05) %>% 
  select(-warnings, -errors) %>% 
  knitr::kable(format = "html", digits = c(2, 2, 2, 2, 2, 3), align = "l", table.attr = "style='width:90%;'") %>% 
  kableExtra::kable_styling()
```


<!-- JUNK -->
<!-- Add alternative parameterization (when k=2)-->
<!-- add_row(., -->
<!--           paramHeader = str_replace(.$paramHeader, "l", "2"), -->
<!--           param = .$param, -->
<!--           se = .$se, -->
<!--           sig = .$sig, -->
<!--           est = - .$est, -->
<!--           ORs_low2.5 = 1/.$ORs_up2.5, -->
<!--           ORs_est = round(exp(- .$est),2), -->
<!--           ORs_up2.5 = 1/.$ORs_low2.5 -->
<!--           ) -->
